title: [FIRRTL] SFC Memory Lowering: Respect Write Collision Behavior

features.name: multi_port_memory_same_clock_ordered_writes
features.description: Code should include a multi-port memory with two write ports (w0, w1) sharing the same clock, where simultaneous writes to the same address result in deterministic ordered behavior based on port declaration order

features.name: multi_port_memory_separate_clock_blocks_unordered_writes
features.description: Code should include a multi-port memory with two write ports sharing the same clock but placed in separate always blocks, where simultaneous writes to the same address have undefined ordering behavior
